titleStmt.title: SII 18.285: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 285. (B.K. No. 47 of 1932-33.) GUTTAL, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone set up in front of the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Vīrapratāpa Sadāśivarāya is dated in Śaka 146[9], Plava, Ās11hāḍha, śu. 11. Śaka 1469 was Plavaṅga and in this year the details correspond to A.D. 1547 June 28, Tuesday. It registers the remission of taxes on barbers by Mallapoḍeya, under the orders of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāja. The order conveying the remission was handed to Timmōja, Bhammōja and Koṇḍōja. It is interesting to note that the implements of barbers are engraved on the stone below the inscribed portion.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śā
1469 nevaruśada plava
saṁvatsarada Āśāḍa śa(śu) 11 llu śrīmaṁ
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivarā
ya mahāpratāparājyavanāḷuttira
lu śrī mahāmaṁḍalēśvara . rāmarā
jayana nirūpadiṁdallū rāyarū
Āḷuva rājyadoḷage yida nāvila
tiṁmōja bhammōja koṁḍōjaga
ki sidhāya birāḍavanu Enuṁḷa sa
rvamānyavāgi pālisideU Ā rā
marājaAyanavarā mallapoḍe
yarige niṁma sīmevoḷage yida nā
vilara teṟuge sidhāya birāḍa kā
ṇike kaḍāya maduvesuṁka sarvamā
nyavanu koṭeU yaṁdu hēḷi rāma
rājaAyanavara nirūpavanu ko
ṭeU yaṁdu Avara nirūpadiṁda
lu sarvamānyavāgi koṭeU yiṣṭa
ke tapidare rāyara pādadāṇi
śrīvirūpākṣadēvarige tapidu . yī
sāsanake tapidare katteya tuṇi
kaḷḷamoge
Digital edition of SII 18.285 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
